old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-go8k","title":"Jitter multicast DIS and suppress DIO","description":"Use bounded node-differentiated Trickle jitter for multicast DIS and distinguish accepted-consistent, accepted-inconsistent, and rejected DIOs so only valid consistent DIOs increment redundancy.","acceptance_criteria":"Multiple nodes schedule different bounded multicast-DIS transmit times; accepted consistent DIO suppresses by k; rejected DIO does not increment redundancy.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-20T07:09:20.555732721Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-20T07:09:20.555732721Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-go8k","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-d7uj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-20T07:09:20.639389986Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}
